summary: WIP PR that began converting SysDolphin AObj and display allocation routines out of raw assembly into C, added supporting AObj/FObj/List/DisplayFunc headers, renamed residual assembly files to *_asm, and propagated newly identified HSD_* symbol names through other assembly references. It was closed unmerged, but the slice captures useful early decomp tactics for staged C conversion while preserving order and matching.
what_changed: Renamed asm/aobj.s to asm/aobj_asm.s and removed the initial AObj routines from the assembly body as they were replaced by src/sysdolphin/aobj.c.

Added src/sysdolphin/aobj.c with C implementations for HSD_AObjInitAllocData, HSD_AObjGetAllocData, HSD_AObjGetFlags, HSD_AObjSetFlags, HSD_AObjClearFlags, HSD_AObjInitEndCallBack, and HSD_AObjInvokeCallBacks.
Kept HSD_AObjSetFObj as a staged conversion: a readable NON_MATCHING C version plus an inline asm matching version that calls HSD_FObjRemoveAll.
Added src/sysdolphin/aobj.h with AOBJ_* flag constants and struct declarations for HSD_AObj, HSD_AObjDesc, and HSD_AnimJoint.
Added src/sysdolphin/fobj.h with HSD_FObj, HSD_FObjDesc, FObjData, animation op constants, fraction-format constants, and object type constants.
Renamed func_8036A99C to HSD_FObjRemoveAll in asm/fobj.s, updated its recursive self-call, and added a prototype in include/functions.h.

Renamed AObj-related callsites across asm/text_1.s and asm/jobj.s from raw func/lbl names to HSD_AObjGetFlags, HSD_AObjSetFlags, HSD_AObjClearFlags, HSD_AObjSetFObj, HSD_AObjInitEndCallBack, and HSD_AObjInvokeCallBacks.
Added src/sysdolphin/displayfunc.c and displayfunc.h for HSD_ZListInitAllocData, moving that allocator initialization out of renamed asm/displayfunc_asm.s.
Added src/sysdolphin/list.h with HSD_SList so callback-list traversal in HSD_AObjInvokeCallBacks could be expressed in C.
Updated ldscript.lcf to place aobj.o before aobj_asm.o and displayfunc.o before displayfunc_asm.o, preserving text layout while splitting converted C from residual assembly.
Included dolphin/mtx/mtxtypes.h from include/global.h to support Mtx/MtxPtr usage in the new displayfunc code.
Fixed missing EOF newlines in several existing files, matching the reviewer complaint.
smart_moves: Used *_asm file renames instead of deleting assembly wholesale, making it clear which parts were converted and which text remained as raw asm.
Updated ldscript.lcf immediately after splitting files, a critical step for maintaining section order and symbol addresses during partial decompilation.

Used #pragma force_active around HSD_AObjGetAllocData with an explicit comment that the function was otherwise unused until table integration, preserving an otherwise dead function needed for matching.
Used a NON_MATCHING C block plus inline asm for HSD_AObjSetFObj, documenting intended semantics while retaining a matching emitted body.
Renamed callsites and function-pointer address loads in large assembly files, not just direct branches, so cross-file symbol identity became searchable and less error-prone.
Introduced minimal dependent structs and headers only as needed for the conversion, including HSD_SList for callback traversal and HSD_ZList for allocator sizing.
Limited HSD_AObjSetFlags and HSD_AObjClearFlags to AOBJ_LOOP | AOBJ_NO_UPDATE before mutating flags, matching the observed rlwinm mask behavior rather than accepting arbitrary bits.
decomp_lessons: When converting only the front of an assembly file, split converted C and remaining assembly into separate objects and update the linker script in the same PR.
If a matched function is currently unreferenced by C but must remain in the binary, #pragma force_active can be used with a comment explaining the future table/reference expectation.
For stubborn functions, a useful intermediate state is to provide the NON_MATCHING C equivalent next to inline asm; future work can improve the C while keeping a known-good matching implementation.
Global symbol renames should be propagated to all assembly callsites and address materializations so later searches find semantic names instead of stale func_ addresses.
Header work often unlocks C conversion: even small support types like HSD_SList or MtxPtr dependencies can be necessary to express allocator init and callback traversal cleanly.
Reviewers cared about file hygiene in this early repo slice; missing EOF newlines were enough to trigger a changes-requested review.
Evidence is weak on why the PR was ultimately closed without merge: the dump shows one changes-requested review for EOF newlines and a later approval, but no explanatory comments.
naming_conventions: SysDolphin library functions use HSD_* names, e.g. HSD_AObjGetFlags, HSD_AObjSetFlags, HSD_AObjClearFlags, HSD_AObjSetFObj, HSD_AObjInitEndCallBack, HSD_AObjInvokeCallBacks, HSD_FObjRemoveAll, and HSD_ZListInitAllocData.
Residual assembly files after partial conversion were named with an _asm suffix, e.g. aobj_asm.s and displayfunc_asm.s.
AObj flag macros used the AOBJ_* prefix with bit-shift definitions, including AOBJ_REWINDED, AOBJ_FIRST_PLAY, AOBJ_NO_UPDATE, AOBJ_LOOP, and AOBJ_NO_ANIM.
Struct typedefs followed the decomp style typedef struct _HSD_AObj { ... } HSD_AObj and pointer fields used forward struct names for cross-references.
The PR used the name HSD_AObjInitEndCallBack with capital B in CallBack, matching the symbol spelling shown in the diff rather than normalizing it.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Moved matched allocator/init and flag-accessor routines from asm/aobj_asm.s into C while leaving remaining unmatched AObj code in assembly.
Preserved text order via ldscript.lcf entries: aobj.o then aobj_asm.o, and displayfunc.o then displayfunc_asm.o.
Used inline asm with nofralloc for HSD_AObjSetFObj to keep exact prologue/epilogue and branch layout while recording the intended C under NON_MATCHING.
Applied #pragma optimization_level 2 around HSD_AObjInvokeCallBacks, indicating compiler settings were part of the matching recipe.
Kept dummy locals u32 junk1 and u32 junk2 in HSD_AObjInvokeCallBacks, likely as a stack/register-shaping tactic; the diff provides no further explanation.
Updated direct branches and lis/addi function-pointer sequences in asm/text_1.s to semantic labels such as HSD_AObjSetFlags@ha/@l.
Renamed func_8036A99C to HSD_FObjRemoveAll and updated its recursive call, avoiding mixed old/new symbol names inside the same routine.
follow_up_queries: Find later PRs that completed or replaced the HSD_AObjSetFObj NON_MATCHING inline asm conversion.
Search for HSD_AObjInitEndCallBack spelling in later history to see whether CallBack capitalization was preserved or renamed.
Look for later commits moving HSD_FObjRemoveAll prototype from include/functions.h into src/sysdolphin/fobj.h.
Compare later aobj.h layouts against this PR's HSD_AObj, HSD_AObjDesc, and HSD_AnimJoint definitions.
Check whether HSD_ZList was later moved from displayfunc.c into a public/private header.
